careers.description: Design, develop and maintain software applications and systems.
careers.path_after_10th: Take PCM stream in Class 11 and 12. Focus on Maths and Physics.
careers.path_after_12th: Appear for JEE Main/Advanced. Get admission in B.Tech CSE (4 years). OR do BCA (3 years) as alternative.
careers.path_after_graduation: M.Tech CSE / MBA (Tech Management) / Direct industry placement.
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee)
National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand (NIT UK)
University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES Dehradun)
Graphic Era Deemed to be University
Graphic Era Hill University (GEHU) - Bhimtal Campus
Gurukula Kangri (Deemed to be University) - GK(DU)
Veer Madho Singh Bhandari Uttarakhand Technical University (UTU)

careers.description: Diagnose and treat illnesses, injuries and medical conditions.
careers.path_after_10th: Take PCB stream in Class 11 and 12. Score minimum 50% in PCB. Focus on Biology and Chemistry.
careers.path_after_12th: Appear for NEET UG. Get admission in MBBS (5.5 years including 1 year internship).
careers.path_after_graduation: NEET PG for MD/MS specialisation. Or practice as General Physician.
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)

careers.description: Design, build and maintain infrastructure like roads, bridges, buildings, dams.
careers.path_after_10th: Take PCM in Class 11-12. Focus on Maths and Physics.
careers.path_after_12th: JEE Main/Advanced for B.Tech Civil Engineering (4 years).
careers.path_after_graduation: M.Tech Structural/Geotechnical Engineering. GATE exam for PSU jobs or PG.
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee)
National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand (NIT UK)
University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES Dehradun)
Graphic Era Deemed to be University
Gurukula Kangri (Deemed to be University) - GK(DU)

careers.description: Lead business operations, teams, strategy and organisational growth.
careers.required_stream_class_11_12: Any stream (Commerce preferred but not mandatory)
careers.path_after_10th: Commerce or any stream in Class 11-12. Focus on Economics, Business Studies.
careers.path_after_12th: BBA (3 years) — direct management degree. Or any graduation then MBA.
careers.path_after_graduation: MBA (2 years) via CAT/MAT/XAT. Specialisations: Finance, Marketing, HR, Operations.
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: Indian Institute of Management Kashipur (IIM Kashipur)
University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES Dehradun)
Graphic Era Deemed to be University

careers.description: Provide patient care, administer medications, assist doctors in hospitals and clinics.
careers.path_after_10th: Take PCB stream. Score minimum 45-50% in Class 12.
careers.path_after_12th: B.Sc Nursing (4 years) via NEET UG or direct merit. OR GNM Diploma (3 years).
careers.path_after_graduation: M.Sc Nursing. Or work in hospitals, defence, airlines, abroad (Middle East, UK, Canada).
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh)

careers.description: Build AI models and extract insights from large datasets to solve business problems.
careers.path_after_10th: PCM in Class 11-12. Focus on Mathematics and Statistics.
careers.path_after_12th: B.Tech CSE with AI/ML specialisation (4 years) via JEE. Or B.Sc Maths/Statistics.
careers.path_after_graduation: M.Tech AI/ML or M.Sc Data Science. Or work directly in tech companies.
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee)
University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES Dehradun)
Graphic Era Deemed to be University

careers.description: Dispense medications, advise patients on drug use, work in pharmaceutical companies or hospitals.
careers.path_after_10th: PCB stream in Class 11-12. Focus on Chemistry and Biology.
careers.path_after_12th: B.Pharmacy (4 years) or D.Pharmacy (2 years diploma).
careers.path_after_graduation: M.Pharmacy (2 years) for research/industry. Pharm.D for clinical pharmacy.
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES Dehradun)
Gurukula Kangri (Deemed to be University) - GK(DU)

careers.description: Represent clients in courts, draft legal documents, provide legal advice to individuals and organisations.
careers.path_after_10th: Any stream in Class 11-12. Arts with Political Science and History preferred.
careers.path_after_12th: BA LLB (5 years integrated) via CLAT exam. Best option to start early.
careers.path_after_graduation: LLB (3 years) after any graduation. Then enroll with Bar Council of India.
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: Graphic Era Hill University (GEHU) - Bhimtal Campus
Gurukula Kangri (Deemed to be University) - GK(DU)

careers.description: Report news, create content, conduct interviews, work in print, TV, digital or radio media.
careers.path_after_10th: Any stream. Arts with English and Hindi recommended.
careers.path_after_12th: BJMC (3 years) or BA Journalism (3 years) after 12th.
careers.path_after_graduation: MA Mass Communication (2 years). Work in newspapers, TV channels, digital platforms.
careers.primary_degree: BJMC (Bachelor of Journalism and Mass Communication)
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University (HNB Garhwal University)

careers.description: Protect and manage India's forests, wildlife, and natural resources. Prestigious central government service.
careers.path_after_10th: Science stream with Biology or Maths.
careers.path_after_12th: B.Sc Forestry (4 years) or B.Sc Agriculture or B.Sc Botany/Zoology.
careers.path_after_graduation: UPSC Civil Services Exam (IFS paper). M.Sc Forestry for higher roles.
uttarakhand_colleges_offering: Forest Research Institute Deemed to be University (FRI)
Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology (GBPUAT)
Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University (HNB Garhwal University)
